complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement merged article fetching in ArticleRepositoryImpl
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Implement parallel fetching with Future.wait, 2) Create private merge/deduplicate/sort method with title normalization and Firestore preference, 3) Add fallback logic for publishedAt/createdAt and isUserArticle flag, 4) Implement partial failure handling with error metadata.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to parallel async operations, custom deduplication logic with normalization, sorting with fallbacks, error handling for partial failures, and entity modifications. Requires careful testing of edge cases like duplicates and failures. Follows clean architecture but involves multiple data sources.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Define Cubit states and implement init/refresh logic with GetArticlesUseCase, 2) Register Cubit in DI container and update dependencies.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Standard BLoC to Cubit migration with straightforward state management and use case integration. Low complexity as it follows established patterns with clear states and mockable dependencies. Dependency on task 29 adds minor coordination overhead.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Update home feed UI to render merged articles
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Integrate BlocBuilder with RemoteArticlesCubit, add user article badge to ArticleWidget, preserve navigation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Straightforward UI update using existing widgets and BLoC pattern. Minimal visual changes reduce design complexity. Widget testing is standard for Flutter apps.
Simple Flutter RefreshIndicator integration with cubit method. Standard UX pattern with minimal custom logic. Widget tests are routine.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement searchArticles in repository with merge reuse
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Implement Firestore client-side filtering and NewsAPI /everything endpoint calls, 2) Extract and reuse merge logic from getNewsArticles, 3) Add query debouncing and edge case handling (empty query, no results).
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Reuses merge logic but adds search-specific querying across two sources with different APIs, debouncing, and case-insensitive matching. Similar complexity to task 29 but with additional query handling.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Create SearchArticlesUseCase delegating to repository, 2) Implement SearchArticleCubit with debounced query handling and state emissions, register in DI.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Standard use case + cubit pattern with added debounce timer logic. Slightly more complex than basic cubit due to timing and rapid query handling.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Build search UI screen with results and empty state
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Create search screen layout with TextField and BlocBuilder, 2) Implement empty/error states and app bar integration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Standard Flutter screen with form input, list rendering, and state handling. Reuses existing ArticleWidget. Routine navigation and testing.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Build MainScreen with BottomNavigationBar and IndexedStack, 2) Configure tabs for Feed/Create/Profile with state preservation, 3) Update routing to use MainScreen as root preserving deep links.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Involves app shell refactoring, state preservation across tabs, routing changes, and Material 3 compliance. Higher complexity due to navigation coordination and potential state management issues.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Add deleteArticle to data source/repository/use case, 2) Create DeleteArticleCubit, 3) Update UI to show delete button for owned articles, 4) Handle auth limitations and post-delete UI refresh.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Spans multiple layers (data, domain, presentation), client-side ownership checks, Firestore operations, and UI updates across screens. Integration testing adds complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Implement ThemeCubit with load/save logic using shared_preferences, wrap MaterialApp with BlocProvider, update MainScreen consumption.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Standard state persistence pattern with well-documented shared_preferences and BLoC integration. Minimal custom logic beyond pubspec update.
